# Royal Mercaderistas API Instructions

## Objective
Keep sessions short, focused, and task-driven.

## Workflow
- Work on one clear backend task at a time.
- Read only the files needed for the current endpoint or use case.
- Avoid broad repository scans unless explicitly requested.
- Prefer small, verifiable implementation steps.

## Communication
- Respond in concise Spanish by default.
- First provide the direct result, then only essential details.
- If information is missing, ask a single concrete question.

## Code Changes
- Reuse existing use case, repository, and controller patterns.
- Avoid broad refactors while fixing one bug.
- Update only the minimal set of files required.

## Validation
- Prefer targeted checks by route/use case over full runs.
- Report what was validated and what could not be validated.
